failures.description: The agent fabricated the answer instead of using the tool result. ProductCatalogSearch returned 13 available Mechanical Keyboard options, but the Executor answered 20 and added a nonexistent record ID.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to count available Mechanical Keyboard options. Steps 1-3 correctly planned and executed ProductCatalogSearch, which returned count 13. At index 4, all required information was available, but the Executor produced unsupported information: count 20 and record 0000000000, neither grounded in the tool output. This invented value was used as the final answer and was not corrected later.
